dashboard.headline: Ship hiring workflows with clarity
dashboard.subtitle: Premium workspace for candidates, hiring teams, and operators.

validations.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
validations.usernameMin: Username must be at least 3 characters.
validations.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validations.passwordComplexity: Password must include uppercase, lowercase, and a number.
validations.acceptTerms: Please accept Terms and Privacy Policy.

settingsPage.title: Profile Settings
settingsPage.subtitle: Manage your profile, account security, and preferences from one control center.

tabs.profileDesc: Photo, bio, links, and professional details

jobsPage.loadErrorDesc: Check that the Spring Boot backend is running and reachable.
jobsPage.noMatchDesc: Try clearing one or two filters, or search a broader location or company name.

applicationsPage.title: Track every stage of your hiring journey.
applicationsPage.emptyDesc: Your submitted applications will appear here.

seed.welcome: Welcome to JobPlus messaging. Keep every hiring conversation in one place.
seed.backendReady: This thread is ready for backend integration when messaging APIs are enabled.

messagesPage.loginRequired: Please log in to access your hiring conversations.

notificationsPage.title: Stay updated on everything that matters
notificationsPage.emptyDesc: Application updates and hiring activity will appear here.

jobDetails.notFoundDesc: This job may have been removed or the backend is not available.
jobDetails.requirementsFallback: Detailed requirements will be shared during the application review.
jobDetails.responsibility1: Collaborate with hiring stakeholders and cross-functional teams.
jobDetails.responsibility2: Deliver outcomes aligned with business priorities and role expectations.
jobDetails.responsibility3: Maintain quality, communication, and execution consistency.
jobDetails.benefit1: Flexible work arrangements across onsite, hybrid, and remote options.
jobDetails.benefit2: Career growth support and structured professional development.
jobDetails.benefit3: Transparent hiring stages with status updates in your dashboard.
jobDetails.whyApply1: Clean application flow with resume, cover letter, and saved job support.
jobDetails.whyApply2: Visible hiring signals including company, work mode, level, and salary.
jobDetails.whyApply3: Role details are structured for mobile and desktop review before conversion.
jobDetails.process1: Application submitted and tracked in your candidate dashboard.
jobDetails.process2: Employer review with shortlist and status updates in real time.
jobDetails.process3: Ready for notifications and interview scheduling in later phases.
jobDetails.companySnapshotDesc: {{company}} is presented with a production-style profile, open roles, and clearer candidate conversion paths.
jobDetails.readyToApplyDesc: Use your profile information or uploaded resume and keep tracking status from the candidate dashboard.
jobDetails.recruiterDesc: Hiring manager from {{company}}. Response time is typically within 3 business days.
